title: Warhammer Quest - Take a Look - Part 5 - The Catacombs of Terror
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6d8jMrgjDuE

Daniel (@dungeondive) examines the second big box expansion for Warhammer Quest: The Catacombs of Terror. Where Lair of the Orc Lord expanded horizontally with more of the same, Catacombs takes things underground — new environments, new threats, and a different flavour of dungeon delving.

Daniel has the box, the contents, and opinions. The comparison between the two big box expansions is instructive for anyone deciding which to prioritise when building out their Warhammer Quest collection.

----

When a game has multiple big box expansions, do you research which to buy first or just grab whatever you find?
